title: Can I switch a file to a portfolio ?
excerpt: Hello, my compagny started to use Monday to manage projects. We created files for each project but we heard about Portfolio. How can I drop all my files in the portfolio or How can I switch a file to a portfolio ? ?

posts.author: rlsavoie (Rox-anne)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, my compagny started to use Monday to manage projects. We created files for each project but we heard about Portfolio. How can I drop all my files in the portfolio or How can I switch a file to a portfolio ? ?
